name: ClusPro_submit_peptide_docking
description: Submit a peptide-protein docking job to ClusPro (peptide mode) and return the ClusPro job id. Docks a short peptide (motif + sequence) against a receptor given by 4-letter PDB code. Docking is asynchronous (hours); retrieve clustered poses + scores from your ClusPro results page. Requires a FREE academic ClusPro account: set CLUSPRO_USERNAME and CLUSPRO_API_SECRET. Peptide mode is for SHORT peptides (~<=30 residues).

receptor_pdb_id.description: 4-letter PDB code of the receptor protein, e.g. '1A2K'.

peptide_sequence.description: Peptide amino-acid sequence (1-letter), e.g. 'KGRRL'. Short peptides only.

peptide_motif.description: Peptide motif for PDB fragment search (X = wildcard), e.g. 'KXRRL'. Defaults to peptide_sequence if omitted.

jobname.description: Optional job name (defaults to a ClusPro job number).

CLUSPRO_USERNAME.purpose: Authenticate peptide-protein docking submissions to the ClusPro server (free for academic use).
CLUSPRO_USERNAME.without: The ClusPro_submit_peptide_docking tool is hidden until both ClusPro keys are set.

CLUSPRO_API_SECRET.purpose: API secret paired with CLUSPRO_USERNAME for signing ClusPro peptide-docking submissions.
CLUSPRO_API_SECRET.without: The ClusPro_submit_peptide_docking tool is hidden until both ClusPro keys are set.
